title: Door — First Washes
builderNotes: Simple pencil door outline (2H) + 4 large watercolor washes. Lapis top-left, rose top-right, gold mid, terre verte bottom. fillBleed(0.6) for organic edges.
criticNotes: Paper breathing nicely. Washes too transparent — need more color body. Door pencil weight is good.

title: Door — Wash Balance
builderNotes: Adjusted wash positions, slightly more overlap between colors.
criticNotes: Better overlap but still too faded. Not enough contrast.

title: Door — Favorite Base
builderNotes: Refined door arch + diamond keystone. Balanced 4 washes with natural bleed. Minimal pencil — just enough to suggest the door.
criticNotes: BEST SO FAR. Perfect balance of paper/paint. Pencil ghosts through. Colors are soft but present. This is the target quality.

title: Door — Abstract Gestural
builderNotes: Direction change: abstract gestural. Bold diagonal sweeps, horizontal drags. marker + 2B brushes. Edge-to-edge strokes ignoring the door.
criticNotes: Bold energy but lost the door entirely. Too aggressive. The pencil whisper is buried.

title: Door — Bold Markers
builderNotes: Refined m4: stronger pencil door (#333, weight 3.0). 6 marker sweeps — diagonals, horizontals, verticals.
criticNotes: Better balance than m4. Door ghosts through. But strokes too uniform — all same weight.

title: Door — M3 + Notes
builderNotes: Back to m3 base. Added: crayon scribbles (terre verte, brown), small watercolor section fills, thin gold accent line.
criticNotes: Right direction. Brown crayon marks look like bugs. Remove brown. Section fills are nice.

title: Door — No Brown
builderNotes: Fixed: replaced brown crayon with teal, lapis blue, gold marks. Same base as m7.
criticNotes: Clean. No brown. Crayon marks match palette. Could use more color saturation on the washes.

title: Door — Rich Opaque
builderNotes: Boosted all fill opacities to 150-240 range. Added more section fills. Rich saturated color.
criticNotes: TOO MUCH. Drowned the pencil. Paper barely visible. Over-corrected from m8.

title: Door — Balanced
builderNotes: Dialed back to halfway between m8 and m9. Background washes at 60-90 opacity. 3-4 fills total. 30-40% bare paper target.
criticNotes: Good balance. Green bottom-left slightly dominant. Pencil visible, paper breathing. Close to m3 quality with more color.

title: Door — Pressure Variation
builderNotes: Added pressure variation: strokeWeight varies 0.3-2.5 on pencil, sinusoidal pressure on curves, random jitter per segment.
criticNotes: Subtle improvement. Pressure variation visible but could be more dramatic. The thick-thin contrast needs to be bolder.

title: Step 1: First Wash
builderNotes: Blank cream → one lapis wash drops in at frame 10
criticNotes: Single wash on cream paper. Element-by-element placement working.

title: Step 3: Washes + Pencil
builderNotes: Multiple washes + pencil door lines simultaneous
criticNotes: Washes and pencil appearing together from early frames.

title: Step 4: Vine Growing
builderNotes: Vine starts from bottom center, splitting Y, first leaves + flower bud
criticNotes: GROWTH PATH WORKING. Vine visible climbing from bottom.
